description: Editable run-sheet JSON for Comfy Cloud Standard style-bible lookdev passes.
recommendedModel: Flux Kontext Pro or Flux 1.1 Pro
goal: Lock one painterly SRPG visual language before unit and terrain production.

inputs.seedStrategy: keep one seed family per visual direction and vary only when the style drifts

operatorChecklist: Cover grass, road, forest, bridge, Rowan, Elira, Hexbinder, and at least two zoom-combat moods.
Reject any result that is too glossy, too photoreal, or too cluttered for later sprite derivation.
Save accepted images under output/comfy/style-bible/ and log model, prompt, and seed.
